# Code of Conduct

The Vane community is committed to respectful, safe, and productive collaboration.

Be considerate, technically honest, and open to correction. Critique ideas and code rather than people, make space for newcomers, protect private information, and give credit for others' work.

Harassment, threats, discrimination, sexualized attention, intimidation, doxxing, sustained disruption, retaliation, and knowingly false claims are not acceptable. This policy applies in repositories, reviews, discussions, events, and other spaces where someone represents Vane.

Report a public, non-sensitive concern to a Vane maintainer. Use the parent Vane repository's private advisory channel for confidential or urgent reports and mark the report as a conduct concern. A maintainer involved in a report must recuse themselves. Responses may include a warning, content removal, temporary restriction, or permanent exclusion.
